free_text: IS THE FINAL PUBLICATION WHICH
SUMMARIZES A SERIES OF MEASUREMENTS OF CROSS-SECTIONS
AND ANG.DISTRIBUTIONS OF GAMMA-RAYS FOLLOWING
THE INELASTIC SCATTERING OF FAST NEUTRONS ON FE-56.
A LEVEL SCHEME IS ALSO DEDUCED.
PREVIOUS PUBLICATIONS REFERRING TO THE SAME
EXPERIMENTS ARE.
PROCEEDINGS OF THE
INTERNAT L SYMPOSIUM ON NEUTRON INDUCED REACTIONS ,
SMOLENICE, 1- 7 SEPT. 1974. PAGE N. STILL UNKNOWN.
SAME AS NSE,55,168 BUT LESS DETAILED. PLOTS ONLY GIVEN
GIVES IN ADDITION A COMPARISON
WITH DATA OBTAINED FROM THE FE-56(P,P GAMMA) REACTION
BUT THE INCIDENT NEUTRON ENERGY RANGE IS RESTRICTED
TO 4.8 - 8.8 MEV. (IN FRENCH).
SAME AS NP/A BUT WITH A LESS
DETAILED TRANSITION SCHEME. THE COMPARISON WITH
FE-56(P,P GAMMA) IS NOT GIVEN. (IN FRENCH)
SAME AS 73KIEV BUT ABSTRACT
ONLY.
REFERS TO PREVIOUS EXPERIMENTS.
SAME ENERGY RANGE AS IN NSE (2.50-14.1 MEV) FOR
INCIDENT NEUTRONS. LESS DETAILED DECAY SCHEME.
NO DATA GIVEN FOR GAMMA-RAY ANGULAR DISTRIBUTIONS.
GAMMA-RAYS MEASURED FOR
NEUTRONS OF 8.72 MEV ENERGY. LEVEL SCHEME GIVEN.
DESCRIBES THE GAMMA-RAY
SPECTROMETER USED IN THE EXPERIMENTS.
-GAMMA-RAY-PRODUCTION CROSS-SECTIONS FOR THE
FE-56(N,N GAMMA) REACTION FROM 2.5 TO 14.1 MEV
NEUTRON ENERGIES.-
TANDEM VAN DE GRAAFF, BRUYERES-LE-CHATEL.
AUXILIARY 550 KEV VAN DE GRAAFF ACCELERATOR.
D(D,N)HE-3, PULSED. 3CM LONG GAS TARGET FOR
NEUTRON ENERGY RANGE 4.8 TO 8.8 MEV. (TANDEM VDG).
USING 550 KEV VAN DE GRAAFF, SOLID TID TARGET FOR 2.5
MEV NEUTRON.
T(D,N)HE-4 FOR 14.1 MEV NEUTRON, SOLID TIT
TARGET AND 550 KEV VAN DE GRAAFF.
NEUTRON ENERGY RESOLUTION (TANDEM) IS,
200 KEV FOR 4.8 MEV NEUTRON AND APPROXIMATELY 100 KEV
FROM 5.8 TO 8.8 MEV.
NEUTRON ENERGY RESOLUTION (VAN DE GRAAFF) IS,
200 KEV (D-D SOURCE) AND (40 KEV) FOR 2.5 AND 14.1 MEV
INCIDENT BEAMS, RESPECTIVELY.
A CYLINDER OF NATURAL IRON, 20 MM-DIAM, 25 MM-LONG.
TIME OF FLIGHT.
67 CM3 GE(LI) DETECTOR SITUATED INSIDE A
305 * 305 * 80 MM HOLLOW CYLINDER OF NAI(TL)
.COMPTON SUPPRESSION MODE IN THE RANGE 0.5 TO 8 MEV(G).
.PAIR SPECTROMETER MODE FOR GAMMA ENERGY ABOVE 1.1 MEV.
FOR MONITORING OF INCIDENT NEUTRONS.
INTEGRATION CHARGE OF THE BEAM, COUNTING OF PROTON
FROM D(D,P)T WITH 2 SURFACE BARRIER DIODES AND
DETECTION OF INCIDENT NEUTRON BY NE213 LIQUID
SCINTILLATOR WITH N-GAMMA DISCRIMINATION ARE USED.
BY HOPKINS-BREIT,NUCLEAR DATA,A9(1971)137
GAMMAS.
ERROR INFORMATION IS GIVEN IN TABLE OF TEXT.
FLUX(5PC), GE(LI) DETECTOR(2 - 5 PC. FOR GAMMA LESS
THAN 2.5 MEV AND 5 - 10 PC. FOR HIGHER THAN 2.5 MEV)
AND OTHERS.
GAMMA-RAY INTENSITIES RELATIVE TO THE 846.8 KEV LINE
DEDUCED FROM MEASUREMENTS AT 90 DEG. FOR INCIDENT
NEUTRON ENERGIES OF 6.3 AND 7.3 MEV.
